# Stone

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Stone;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Stone { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

mineral, geology, nature, solid, pebble, crystal, ore, hard, coal, stone, rock, boulder
